title: Last Day to Sign Up for Artsy Ornaments Online Class
excerpt: As I mentioned before in this blog post , I am so excited to be a part of this collaborative workshop started by Christy Tomlinson called the 2013 Artsy Ornaments of Christmas . This workshop has 12 awesome artists collaborating,…
body:
As I mentioned before in this blog post, I am so excited to be a part of this collaborative workshop started by Christy Tomlinson called the 2013 Artsy Ornaments of Christmas. This workshop has 12 awesome artists collaborating, all in video, so you can watch along as these artsy girls show you step by step how to create amazing holiday projects. You will also have PDF"s and Supply Lists you can download to keep as well. This year's workshop starts a few weeks early.. on Tuesday November 19th - which is tomorrow! Christy thought with all the crazy good holiday things we find ourselves wrapped up in, it would be nice to get a head start on these projects before the Thanksgiving weekend!

Here are a couple peeks at my project (which I had so much fun creating):

Hope you will join in on the fun! See you tomorrow!

2013 Artsy Ornament of Christmas Workshop $24.95

GIVEAWAY IS CLOSED, but you can still sign up for the class and you'll have access to it all for a whole year! One winner will be selected to get the class for free. If you have already signed up, then I will refund your class fees if you are picked. Leave a comment and a winner will be selected at 7am PST. You'll get an extra entry if you tweet or Facebook or Instagram this. GOOD LUCK! And the winner is #31 - Fleur Millington says: November 18, 2013 at 4:18 pm - CONGRATS!
